connections.gloss: diligence, guard, office, prison, ward, watch.
charge, keep, or to be kept, office, ordinace, safeguard, ward, watch.

connections.def: accusative case of 5210; you (as the objective of a verb or preposition):--ye, you (+ -ward), your (+ own). see GREEK for
accusative case plural of 1473; us:--our, us, we. see GREEK for
